hooks.prompt: If a vault is configured for this session (check CLAUDE.md for a wiki/ folder in the current directory), silently read wiki/hot.md to restore recent context. If wiki/hot.md does not exist, do nothing. Do not announce this. Do not report what you read. Just have the context available.
Hook-injected context does not survive context compaction. If wiki/hot.md exists in the current directory, silently re-read it now to restore the hot cache. Do not announce this.

hooks.command: [ -d .git ] && git add wiki/ raw/ 2>/dev/null && (git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "wiki: auto-commit $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" 2>/dev/null) || true

cd "$PWD" && [ -d wiki ] && [ -d .git ] && git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^wiki/' && echo 'WIKI_CHANGED: Wiki pages were modified this session. Please update wiki/hot.md with a brief summary of what changed (under 500 words). Use the hot cache format: Last Updated, Key Recent Facts, Recent Changes, Active Threads. Keep it factual. Overwrite the file completely. It is a cache, not a journal.' || true
